subcodes.first_line: O thou who art submissive before the gate of divine forgiveness! The letter regarding Jinab-i-Mashhadi Husayn hath been observed... Convey My salutations unto the spiritual Rustam-Dastán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خاضع باب حطه مراسله با جناب مشهدی حسین ملاحظه گردید ... جناب رستم دستان معنوی را تکبیر برسان
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of dreams and visions, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @love as fire, @love of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
